title: Kraken and Nasdaq Partnership Signals Shift to On-Chain Capital Markets
message_html: Kraken and Nasdaq Partnership Signals Shift to On-Chain Capital Markets ...
snippet: Kava (@KAVA_CHAIN): This @krakenfx - @Nasdaq partnership is the signal. Tokenized equities trading around the clock on crypto infrastructure with Fed settlement access? The dam is breaking. On-chain capital markets are transitioning from 'when' to 'now.'
